name: Ribbon Bologna Wedges
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar cream cheese with olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese at room temperature.
2. Spread each slice of bologna with cream cheese.
3. Sprinkle each slice with pecans.
4. Make 2 stacks, placing 6 slices of bologna in each stack.
5. Cover the stacks with plastic wrap and refrigerate until well chilled.
6. Cut each stack into 16 wedges.
7. Garnish with sliced olives and insert colored toothpicks.
